title: tragacantha muelleri
intro: Tragacantha muelleri, also known as Mueller's needle grass, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Tragacantha muelleri are often dried and used as a tea, or made into a poultice to apply topically to affected areas.
